chatbot.title: AI Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Hi! 👋 I'm the AI assistant for Máncora Kite Club. How can I help you today?
chatbot.askClasses: I want to learn about classes
chatbot.selectLevel: Which level are you looking for?
chatbot.finalMessage: Perfect! Let's connect on WhatsApp so we can give you all the details and help you book. Click the button below! 🚀
